## Checklist

- [ ] The feature is scoped and justified
- [ ] Tests cover the main path and important edge cases
- [ ] Performance impact was reviewed when relevant
- [ ] Public API changes are documented
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly described
- [ ] Follow-up work is listed if this is intentionally partial
